executive_summary: Fechamento 01h BRT consolidou manutenção sistêmica do Hermes: Skill Surface Diet all profiles, Ops Bridge v1/P0/P1/P2 read-only, checkpoint GitHub seguro 30min e correção de webhook runaway. Brain Health 0/0 e Improvement Score 94/100. Atenção: maintenance-score 82/watch por ruído Telegram e warnings de Skill Diet; LK Stock tem backlog técnico pós-correção aprovada.

material_changes.change: Skill Surface Diet concluída em todos os profiles/default, config v30 e políticas ativas.
Ops Bridge v1 e sequência P0/P1/P2 implementadas como ferramenta local/read-only de manutenção.
Checkpoint GitHub seguro a cada 30min criado com allowlist, health, secret scan e branch/remote gates.
material_changes.external_write_scope: GitHub push allowlist documental via brain_sync_safe only

material_changes.change: Tiny/Supabase correction approved: 19 exact negative SKUs zeroed in Tiny and read model synced; Shopify write 0.
material_changes.external_write_scope: Tiny stock balance and Supabase read model for 19 approved SKUs only

material_changes.change: Tidio/Christina Bonavides intake produced draft-only local Gmail draft; no send.

incidents.summary: Ops Bridge maintenance score is 82/100 watch due to Skill Diet warnings and Telegram noise findings.
8 deliver=origin candidates need contract review; not an automatic pause instruction.

decisions_made_by_lucas.decision: Approve safe GitHub checkpoint for Hermes Brain every 30 minutes.
decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: Brain Sync safe allowlist, local/silent-OK, no git add dot, no secrets, no runtime/prod changes.
decisions_made_by_lucas.exclusions: No raw artifact push, no Docker/VPS/Traefik, no external business writes.

decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: Local/read-only bridge, QA, maintenance score, daily delta, maintenance ledger, telegram-noise and host-audit read-only.
decisions_made_by_lucas.exclusions: No restart, deploy, cron mutation, dashboard/API, Docker/VPS/Traefik mutation or external writes.

decisions_made_by_lucas.decision: Approve LK Stock correction for 19 exact Tiny negative SKUs.
decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: Tiny balance to zero for exact 19 SKUs and Supabase read model sync for same 19, with readback and rollback.
decisions_made_by_lucas.exclusions: No Shopify write, no other SKUs, no customer/supplier contact, no campaign.

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Frequent GitHub sync is acceptable only as safe checkpoint with allowlist and gates.
approvals_and_corrections.learn: Do not equate dirty working tree with permission to stage broadly.

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Maintenance automation should diagnose and report actionable deltas, not auto-apply risky changes.
approvals_and_corrections.learn: Daily Skill Diet is read-only/silent-OK; weekly/monthly are review surfaces, not mutation authorization.
A Tiny/Supabase approval for 19 SKUs does not authorize Shopify, other SKUs, customer sends or stock promises.

learning_ledger_candidates.lesson: GitHub checkpoint seguro deve ser allowlist-only e gated.
learning_ledger_candidates.action_applied: Documented in daily consolidation and checkpoint report; cron created separately before this run.
learning_ledger_candidates.verification_needed: Observe 30min runs remain ok and HEAD equals origin/main.

learning_ledger_candidates.lesson: Ops Bridge v1 is the read-only maintenance entrypoint.
learning_ledger_candidates.action_applied: Reports and JSON pilot exist; no mutating commands added.
learning_ledger_candidates.verification_needed: Use in next maintenance cycle and track score trend.

learning_ledger_candidates.lesson: Telegram origin jobs need actionable-delivery review.
Webhook runaway fix pattern: fast-ack plus queue, lock, cooldown and bounded background.
learning_ledger_candidates.action_applied: Applied to LK Stock webhook and documented.

autonomy_pattern_candidates.candidate: Brain/GitHub documentary checkpoint via approved safe sync can run automatically.
autonomy_pattern_candidates.must_remain_gated_by: allowlist, branch/remote gate, brain health, secret scan, no raw artifacts

autonomy_pattern_candidates.candidate: Ops Bridge read-only status/health/qa/score can run without approval.
Tiny/Supabase stock corrections remain A3/A4 and cannot become autonomous from this approval.

safe_next_actions: Run Ops Bridge maintenance-score/telegram-noise again after next cycle and classify actionable delivery drift.
Review Skill Surface Diet enabled heavy-skill warnings without auto-disable.
Continue LK Stock Cockpit technical backlog via lk-stock with scoped approvals for any external/source-of-truth write.
Observe GitHub checkpoint 30min for silent-OK and sync cleanliness.
blocked_actions_requiring_approval: Any Shopify/Tiny/GMC/Klaviyo/Meta/Supabase write beyond already approved exact scope.
Any automatic Skill Diet patch/restart/disable by cron.

cron_and_delivery_truth.job: Hermes Brain Fechamento Ágil 01h + Brain Sync

cron_and_delivery_truth.last_observed_status: daily ok; weekly/monthly pending first schedule
cron_and_delivery_truth.attention: Delivery contract says silent/actionable; review origin noise before calling green.
